title: dryopteris wallichiana subsp. reichsteinii
intro: Dryopteris wallichiana subsp. reichsteinii, also known as the Himalayan shield fern, is a subspecies of fern native to the Himalayan region. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris wallichiana subsp. reichsteinii include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer and antiviral properties. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
